---
title: "Contacto"
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

### Correo electrónico:

```{=html}
<div class="contact-links">
  <a href="mailto:jorgemartmarc@gmail.com" class="contact-link">
    <i class="fas fa-envelope"></i> jorgemartmarc@gmail.com
  </a>
</div>
```


### Redes profesionales:

```{=html}
<div class="contact-links">
  <a href="http://www.linkedin.com/in/jorgemartmarc" class="contact-link">
    <i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
  </a>
  <a href="https://github.com/jorgeemm" class="contact-link">
    <i class="fab fa-github"></i> GitHub
  </a>
</div>
```
